meta_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity project template to Solve no version control (Intermediate Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Antigravity project template and overcome no version control. A Intermediate-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: Antigravity Template to Solve No Version Control
content.seo_description: Stop losing client work. Learn to implement the Antigravity project template to solve no version control issues using Claude Code in this expert guide.
content.answer_block: The Antigravity project template enforces rigorous versioning and modular architecture, effectively eliminating 'no version control' chaos. By integrating this with Claude Code, you automate state tracking and commit history, ensuring your freelance projects remain professional, reversible, and scalable from the very first line of code you write.
content.intro:
You’re three hours into a high-stakes client build, the coffee is cold, and you’ve just accidentally overwritten the core authentication module. There is no 'undo' button, no git history, and the deadline is tomorrow. This is the silent killer of freelance careers: the lack of version control.

We don't build like amateurs anymore. The Antigravity project template acts as your safety net, transforming chaotic file-swapping into a structured, production-grade environment. By pairing this with the precision of Claude Code, you don't just write code—you engineer resilient systems that protect your reputation and your revenue.

steps.title: Initialize the Antigravity Scaffold
steps.description: Establish the root directory structure that enforces versioning best practices immediately.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a new project scaffold using the Antigravity standard, ensuring .git, /src, and /docs directories are pre-configured.

steps.title: Automate Versioning Hooks
steps.description: Configure pre-commit hooks to ensure no code enters the repository without a valid state check.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure husky hooks within the Antigravity template to trigger linting and type-checking before every commit.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run 'npm install husky && npx husky add .husky/pre-commit "npm test"'

steps.title: Establish State Snapshots
steps.description: Create automated checkpoints that allow you to revert to stable versions during iterative client feedback cycles.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Setup a script within the Antigravity template to generate semantic versioned snapshots of the project state.

steps.title: Integrate Claude Code CLI
steps.description: Connect the Claude Code agent to your local environment to handle automated documentation and commit message generation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Configure Claude Code to monitor the /src directory and auto-generate commit messages based on changes made to the Antigravity structure.

steps.title: Finalize Deployment Pipeline
steps.description: Ensure the build pipeline validates the repository status before pushing to production servers.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a deployment workflow that checks for a clean git status and valid version tag before allowing a deploy.

pro_tips: Always commit by feature, not by time; use atomic commits to keep your history readable for clients.
Use Claude Code's 'context' mode to feed it your project's README, ensuring the AI understands your specific versioning rules.
Alias your git commands to your shell configuration to shave seconds off every commit cycle.
Treat your '.env.example' file as a first-class citizen; never commit real secrets, only templates.
Set up a 'revert' shortcut in your CLI to instantly roll back to the last known 'Antigravity' stable snapshot.
resources: Git Best Practices for Freelancers: https://git-scm.com/book/en/v2
content.next_steps: Once your environment is configured, practice a 'forced error'—make a breaking change, use your new revert script, and verify that your system recovers in under 30 seconds.
content.conversion_block: Stop gambling with your client's trust and start shipping with the confidence of a lead engineer. Our community of AI Builders provides the templates, the tools, and the peer support to ensure you never lose a line of code again. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
